# Traxis Ecosystem Constellation

*Auto-generated by scan_projects.py on 2026-05-20 00:11. Do not hand-edit.*

## Project Status

**31 active** | 2 complete | 2 retired

- [+] **P1: ProShop Automations** — Fusion 360 add-in connecting to ProShop ERP via GraphQL API for work orders and CAM data.
- [+] **P2: YCM Post Processor Development** — Custom Fusion 360 post processor for YCM NTC1600LY CNC lathe.
- [+] **P3: Customer Portal** — Web portal enabling customers to submit RFQs and track manufacturing orders.
- [+] **P4: Inspection Print and ProShop Automation** — GUI tool for extracting dimensions from engineering drawings and pushing to ProShop ERP.
- [+] **P5: Hyundai Post Processor Development** — Hyundai post processor for Fanuc control CNC machining.
- [+] **P6: Chevalier Post Processor Development** — Fusion 360 post processor for Chevalier EM2040L Fanuc milling center.
- [+] **P7: Customer Outreach** — Diversify customer base by acquiring new clients in marine/naval industries locally.
- [~] **P8: Catastrophe Planning** — Strategic risk planning for machining company business continuity.
- [~] **P9: Shop Floor Cameras** — GoPro photo capture kiosk for ProShop work order uploads.
- [-] **P10: Conversational ProShop** — Natural language interface for querying ProShop ERP manufacturing system.
- [~] **P11: ProShop Mobile App** — Native iOS app for querying ProShop ERP from shop floor.
- [+] **P12: FASData Implementation** — FOCAS connectivity test and live CNC machine monitoring dashboard.
- [=] **P13: Preventive Maintenance** — Battery backup labels for CNC drives. Minimal scope -- just label files.
- [+] **P14: Workstation Display (IPC)** — Chrome extension displaying live ProShop work orders and operations on shop floor workstations.
- [~] **P15: ProShop Replacement Research** — Research and architecture planning for ProShop ERP API integration.
- [=] **P16: Fusion Tool Library Product ID Changer** — Fusion 360 add-in to audit and correct tool library Product IDs for ProShop ERP integration.
- [+] **P17: COTS Crib Kiosk** — Touch-screen kiosk for tool crib inventory checkout via QR scanning.
- [+] **P18: ProShop Message Notifier** — Chrome extension and desktop overlay for ProShop message notifications.
- [+] **P19: Shop Scheduler** — Flask web app scheduling daily shop jobs and surfacing machine readiness.
- [+] **P20: Traxis Data** — Analyzes ProShop ERP data to identify why a CNC machine shop loses money despite high utilization.
- [+] **P21: Haas Communication Investigation** — Pi Zero USB and RS-232 bridge for Haas CNC machine communication.
- [+] **P22: Tool Assembly Management** — Touch-screen kiosk for tool assembly management with ProShop inventory sync and label printing.
- [+] **P23: Air Compressor Communication** — Flask web GUI monitoring EMAX 20HP air compressor via Modbus TCP.
- [-] **P24: Digital Help For Rene** — Automates ProShop work orders, packing slips, and vendor POs for Rene Maldonado.
- [+] **P25: Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)** — Always-running data quality agent for ProShop ERP and FOCAS machine monitoring.
- [+] **P26: SMT Post Processor Development** — Creates and maintains ProShop equipment records for SMT machines and components.
- [+] **P27: Accounting Ingest** — Ingests vendor invoices and purchase orders into ProShop and QuickBooks Online.
- [+] **P28: Proshop API Usage** — Monitors ProShop GraphQL API usage patterns across Traxis projects.
- [~] **P29: Rollo Printer App** — Windows system tray app that prints PDFs to Rollo thermal printer with auto-rescaling.
- [+] **P30: Material Label Extension** — Chrome extension injects print-label buttons on ProShop pages, generates labels via Canvas, sends to Brother printer.
- [+] **P31: Photo Upload Service** — Photo upload service for shop floor tablet capturing and queueing images to ProShop.
- [+] **P32: Breakeven Dashboard** — Visual dashboard displaying CNC machine runtime versus weekly breakeven targets.
- [+] **P33: Tool Library Updater VPO Writer** — CLI utility for managing ProShop ERP tool library entries with AI-powered spec lookup.
- [+] **P34: Chrome Web Store Ops Watcher** — Monitors Chrome Web Store for extension lifecycle events via email.
- [~] **P35: Purchasing Automation** — One-tap purchasing automation with auto-approval and VPO creation.

## Interface Map

| Project | Produces | Consumes |
|---------|----------|----------|
| P1: ProShop Automations | Overseer dashboard (port 8060) under waitress with POST /api/shutdown, /api/status, /api/services/*/restart|stop|start, /api/programming-sessions, programming_time_log.jsonl, overseer.log, **Telegram alerts on service outage/recovery** (one message per outage via Telegram Bot API, resets on recovery) | Health endpoints from 13 managed services (ports 5000-8101 + 5003), FOCAS monitoring.db (path via `TRAXIS_FOCAS_DB` env var; default `C:\FASData\monitoring.db`), ProShop GraphQL API (via managed services), P25 Agent Exploration (TelegramBot :8100, AgentScheduler :8101), P31 Photo Upload Service (:5003), **Telegram Bot API** (via `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` + `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID` env vars — same vars as P25) |

Auto-opens in Explorer when the GUI closes if non-empty; **`Accounting Inbox/Filed/UTILITY_NOTIFICATION/`** — non-bill utility usage notifications (HTML body + JSON sidecar); **`Accounting Inbox/Filed/PAYMENT_VOUCHER/`**; **`PROSHOP_WRITES_AUDIT.md`** — full audit (under P27 folder) of every ProShop write the ingest has made, pulled from `ingest_queue.db` (status=UPLOADED + UPLOAD_FAILED). First generated 2026-05-18 when Wolfgang surfaced that pushes have been "universally wrong"; serves as the triage doc for review/rework/delete in ProShop. Triage findings appended 2026-05-18: 11 of 15 records already deleted by Wolfgang; 4 remain (1 delete, 1 rework, 1 delete-and-redo, 1 keep) + four documented root-cause failure modes. **`[P27 ingest q#<queue_id>]` provenance tag** now prepends every ProShop write's user-visible notes field (bill `note`, PS `specialInstructions`, CPO/Quote `notes`, VPO `remarks`) so P27-pushed records are distinguishable from manual entries in the ProShop UI and the queue_id traces back to `ingest_queue.db`. `probe_addcpo_api.py` — read-only basic-auth introspection harness for `AddCustomerPoInput`/`UpdateCustomerPoPartOrderedDataInput`, twin of P35's `probe_addpo_api.py`. **`Accounting Inbox/qbo_audit.log`** — append-only, Dropbox-synced, tab-delimited record of every QBO write attempt. Events: `BILL_CREATED` / `BILL_FAILED` / `PDF_ATTACHED` / `PDF_ATTACH_FAILED` with UTC ISO timestamp, env, vendor+id, account+id, account_source (`vendor_last_bill` or `global_fallback`), amount, doc_number, qbo_url, error. | ProShop GraphQL API (ACCOUNTING_CLIENT_ID for purchaseorders/customerpos scope, TOOLKIOSK_CLIENT_ID for tools scope; **basic-auth path uses `ACCOUNTING_SCOPE` env var which gained `workorders:rwdp` on 2026-05-18** to support WorkOrder reads + status mutations for the back-feed mechanism), QBO REST API (OAuth 2.0 production, refresh token auto-renews — production token gets stale if env stays in sandbox mode for >100 days; `_complete_qbo_auth.py` is a one-shot helper that takes a redirect URL on argv and writes the fresh refresh token + realm to `.traxis.env`, bypassing the interactive paste prompt in `qbo_auth.py`), Microsoft Graph API (email attachments + email body text via get_body()), Claude AI API (Sonnet for extraction, Haiku for HTML classification), P22 print service (10.1.1.242:5002 /api/print-image), .traxis.env (credentials), Scanner → Pictures folder (scan_relay.py) |

## Critical Seams

Cross-project contracts — breaking these silently breaks a downstream project.

- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** Overseer expects each HTTP service to expose a health URL returning JSON. Validators in VALIDATORS dict must match service names in SERVICES_CONFIG. P25 services use PYTHON_EXE (not PYTHONW_EXE) with -u flag. AGENT_DIR path must match P25 folder location. **All managed Flask services expose POST /api/shutdown** — Overseer's `_stop_process` POSTs there first (2s timeout) and waits 5s for natural exit before terminate()/kill(). Paths and Python interpreter are env-driven via `TRAXIS_BASE_DIR`
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `TRAXIS_PYTHON`
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `TRAXIS_PYTHONW`
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `TRAXIS_AIRCOMPRESSOR_PYTHONW` (defaults preserve .71's `TRAXIS` user paths). Per-service OAuth secrets (`PROSHOP_CLIENT_SECRET_BRIDGE` for MsgNotifier+COTSCribKiosk
- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** `PROSHOP_CLIENT_SECRET_TOOLKIOSK` for ToolAssemblyKiosk) injected via env={} in SERVICES_CONFIG. **Telegram alerting** fires on "down" state only (not degraded); `ServiceState.alerted` flag prevents duplicates; recovery message sent when service returns to healthy.
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** P9 sends label PNGs to P22 print_service at http://10.1.1.242:5002/api/print-image — payload format {image_base64
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** copies
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** label_name}. Labels are 128px tall (PT-P700 printable area)
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** 180 DPI.
- **P15 (ProShop Replacement Research):** ClaudeCodeResearch authorization (E88F-BE23-AC08) credentials in .env; scope_permission_map.md format used as reference by P1 (ProShop Bridge) and P27 (Accounting Ingest)
- **P17 (COTS Crib Kiosk):** Print payload `{image_base64

- **P19 (Shop Scheduler):** P19 reads P22's tooling.db read-only at ../22. Tool Assembly Management/tool-kiosk/data/tooling.db — path is set in config.py:35 as KIOSK_DB_PATH and must not change without updating config.py. P19 reads tool_inventory table columns: tool_number

Overseer's `validate_tool_assembly_kiosk` reads `kiosk_heartbeat_age_seconds` from /api/health and flips degraded when that value is present (a heartbeat has been seen) and exceeds 300s — so the heartbeat endpoint must stay accepting POSTs without auth. Flask persists the last heartbeat to `data/kiosk_heartbeat.txt` so the signal survives Flask restarts.
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** Modbus register addresses per `REGISTER_MAP.md` — Group 4 live data at HR 1024-1037
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** Group 6 counters at HR 1536-1553
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** Group 7 timers at HR 1800/1920 (empirical
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** not official HR 1792)
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** Group 8 system time at HR 2048-2051. Timer watchdog only auto-resets alarms in `SAFE_AUTO_RESET_ALARMS = {18
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** 43
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** 48
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** 49}` — all other alarms require manual panel intervention.
- **P25 (Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)):** service_wrapper.py launches Overseer and restarts on crash (exponential backoff 30-300s). **Leader election removed 2026-05-10** — srv-01 is sole production host going forward; no more `service_heartbeat.json`. Health endpoints must respond JSON with `"status": "ok"` for Overseer validation. agent_scheduler.py runs check_reminders.py/run_audit.py/scan_projects.py as subprocesses from PROJECT_ROOT. OVERSEER_PYTHON + base path derive from `TRAXIS_PYTHON` + `TRAXIS_BASE_DIR` env vars.
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** ProShop equipment records use `equipmentType` short prefixes (CA
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** MT
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** OM
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** REG
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** PUMP
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** etc.) — pick from existing prefixes when possible to keep grouping consistent. Update/delete mutations key on auto-built Tool # (`equipmentType + equipmentNumber`)
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** NOT `equipmentNumber`. All string fields must be ASCII-only with no newlines (ProShop doesn't unescape JSON unicode/`\n`); use ` | ` as separator. Equipment URL pattern is `/procnc/equipment/{equipmentType}/{tool}`. Image sub-table is UI-only.
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** PO line items use `toolNumber` field (not `itemNumber`) for tools and COTS. `orderNumber` field carries brand + EDP. `shipTo` defaults to Traxis MFG 511 E St Elmo Rd. updatePurchaseOrder mutation: `id` is a separate arg (not inside `data`)
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** poItems use selector {field: "orderNumber"
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** value: "..."} + data {receivedQty
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** releasedQty
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** receivedDate

- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** `update_customer_po`) — beginsession → query-param token → auto-refresh on 401. Every other ProShop mutation stays on OAuth. Mirrors P35's `purchasing/proshop_basic_auth.py`; kept inline to avoid cross-project Python import. ProShop audit log shows Wolfgang's name as creator for these mutations

ORDERBY TxnDate DESC MAXRESULTS 1`) and reusing line[0]'s account; falls back to first COGS
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** then first Expense

On match: hard refuse — no override — row marked `POSSIBLE_DUPLICATE` with `proshop_url` pointing at the existing record. **Permanent reject**: `check_local_duplicate` prefers REJECTED matches over any other; re-ingested content matching a previously-rejected `doc_hash` auto-rejects on insert (applies to email PDF
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** email body
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** and scan paths). **CPO confirmation auto-generation**: after successful `addCustomerPo`

- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** visible). The Tkinter `on_close` handler pops a modal + opens Explorer if the folder is non-empty — never auto-deletes. **ProShop Invoice number is `Invoice.invoiceId`** (not `legacyId`
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** no `invoicePlainText` on Invoice itself). **`Invoice.status` is effectively unused** — binary Outstanding/Booked with only 2 Booked across 1378 invoices over 5 years; the real "is this invoiced" status lives on **`WorkOrder.status`** (values: Active
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** Manufacturing Complete
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** Shipped

- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** NOT the numeric Id. Set this on the Contact record to clear "Bill Sync Error" banners on that customer's invoices. **`updateWorkOrder` mutation confirmed working under basic auth 2026-05-18** (probed on OPM1 26-0155 + batch of 11 stuck WOs). **ProShop→QBO sync is create-only** — once an invoice exists in QBO
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** ProShop-side edits do NOT propagate; must repeat in QBO manually or Stage 2 reconcile will flag as amount mismatch.

- **P30 (Material Label Extension):** equipment

- **P30 (Material Label Extension):** and tool labels encode full ProShop URL. All labels 128px tall at 180 DPI (PT-P700 24mm tape). Tool label uses three-layer data cascade: iframe contentDocument → top-level DOM → GraphQL API (`tools` query with session cookie). CWS extension ID used in registry policy on all shop PCs — changing it requires re-running deploy script. Privacy policy at https://claude-wolfgang.github.io/traxis-privacy/ — must be kept aligned with the manifest's `host_permissions` and `permissions` lists (mismatch is the #1 CWS rejection trigger; the policy lives in repo `claude-wolfgang/traxis-privacy` on GitHub Pages
- **P30 (Material Label Extension):** separate from this code repo).
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** Port 5003 must not conflict with other services. Photo storage at photo-uploader/data/photos/ syncs via Dropbox. Upload worker consumes ProShop web UI via headless Selenium with `--disable-popup-blocking` (required for the COTS popup path). Written description URL pattern: `{BASE}/procnc/parts/{customer}/{partNumber}$formName=writtenDescription&opId={opNumber}`. **Popup picture upload (COTS added 2026-05-15; equipment/tool/fixture added 2026-05-17)** uses a separate `window.open()` popup at `{BASE}/procnc/procncAdmin/fileserver/editpicture$parent_submit=true&...&page=<UUID>&token=<CSRF>&isNew=yes` — the click handler is on an `<a id="fn*">` wrapper around the "Add picture" button
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** requires `ActionChains` trusted-gesture click
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** and auto-commits the parent so no parent SAVE CHANGES is needed; COTS detail URL is the **prefixed** form `/ots/{TYPE}/{TYPE}-{NUMBER}` (bare form 404s); equipment URL is `/equipment/{TYPE}/{TYPE}{NUMBER}` (e.g.
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** `/equipment/CA/CA152`). **WO-page fallback (added 2026-05-13):** when the op's writtenDescription URL produces no usable CKEditor form (no CHECKOUT button within 25s
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** OR checkout fails
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** OR CKEditor not ready within 30s)
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** worker retries on `{BASE}/procnc/workorders/{wo}` and reports success with a non-error info note ("Operation had no written description — uploaded to WO main page instead.") rendered neutral grey on /queue. Only triggers for entity_type=workorder. **ProShop's per-CKEditor-field ceiling is ~240KB**: base64-inline shrink loop tries 6 dimensions × 4 qualities (1200→360 × 75→30); after 2 photos stack onto the same WO main page via fallback
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** subsequent attempts genuinely cannot fit and fail with "page may be full". OAuth scope requires: parts:rwdp
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** workorders:rwdp

## Open Items Requiring Wolfgang

- **P1 (ProShop Automations):** Test spindle load readings on running machines; contact Adion Systems for users:w API scope grant
- **P3 (Customer Portal):** Schedule and execute hardware testing for UploadCam tablets and P-touch label printer
- **P4 (Inspection Print and ProShop Automation):** Approve ITAR compliance strategy and authorize migration approach if choosing cloud solution
- **P5 (Hyundai Post Processor Development):** Repost NC files for 10019 and 10097 100M; verify probe cycles execute without freezing
- **P7 (Customer Outreach):** Send outreach email to Kevin Kaufmann at Saronic Technologies
- **P8 (Catastrophe Planning):** Decide on support approach (AI-assisted vs. professional help) and commit to Customer Outreach project initiation
- **P9 (Shop Floor Cameras):** Obtain PROSHOP_CLIENT_ID, PROSHOP_CLIENT_SECRET from ProShop admin; document QR code format used in printed travelers
- **P11 (ProShop Mobile App):** Purchase Apple Developer Program membership; obtain Mac computer with Xcode; decide whether to proceed with native iOS or pivot to PWA-only approach
- **P12 (FASData Implementation):** Fill in IP addresses for all 10+ machines in README inventory table; enable FOCAS on each CNC control via SYSTEM > EMBED PORT > FOCAS2 settings.
- **P14 (Workstation Display (IPC)):** Deploy restyled IPC v2 to shop floor for operator testing and feedback
- **P15 (ProShop Replacement Research):** Decision on whether to proceed with replacement vs. continue API integration improvements; authorization to escalate change request if no response received
- **P17 (COTS Crib Kiosk):** Test the kiosk on shop floor; verify QR scanner works with HP touchscreen; confirm employee name list accuracy
- **P18 (ProShop Message Notifier):** Deploy Flask server to production and test with shop floor workers.
- **P19 (Shop Scheduler):** Test /api/priorities/report endpoint and provide feedback on job ranking accuracy and bottleneck diagnosis
- **P20 (Traxis Data):** Rene must export QuickBooks P&L by job, bank statements, and utility bills, then run anonymize.py before analysis can proceed
- **P21 (Haas Communication Investigation):** Try swapping TX/RX wires on the MAX3232 board. 5 min physical task.
- **P22 (Tool Assembly Management):** Configure and USB-connect Brother PT-D610BT printer to 10.1.1.178; update kiosk backend URL in .traxis.env when server migration to srv-01 completes
- **P23 (Air Compressor Communication):** Decide whether to accept schedule-only control or pursue alternative start/stop methods (hardware relay, timer manipulation workarounds)
- **P25 (Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)):** Install service_wrapper.py as Windows service on both home PC and collector PC using install_service.bat
- **P26 (SMT Post Processor Development):** Add images to CA153, fill install dates on CA152/CA153, survey floor for other AW-A units
- **P27 (Accounting Ingest):** Approve QBO production credentials and configure live environment access
- **P29 (Rollo Printer App):** Run PyInstaller to rebuild executable and smoke-test with real UPS PDF
- **P31 (Photo Upload Service):** Obtain phone with Moko app to complete B2 badge configuration and factory-reset testing; verify Bluetooth adapter on .71 for local BLE scanning
- **P32 (Breakeven Dashboard):** Verify FASData monitoring.db path and machine_samples table schema; confirm machines.json availability
- **P35 (Purchasing Automation):** Wolfgang: delete test VPOs 263106 and 263119 from ProShop UI.
